source: VibeScan row aligned to benchmarks/results/2026-04-04_044003_dvna_vibescan_cli/vibescan-project.json (case-line match vs results/dvna-case-catalog.json); other tools unchanged from prior adjudication; Semgrep/CodeQL rows cross-checked against benchmarks/results artifacts where noted.
metricDefinition: Per DVNA case (n=1, catalog anchors), a heatmap cell is green when adjudication lists a TP aligned to that location; red when missed—in this evaluated configuration and scope (not universal capability).
scopeNote: First-party DVNA source under benchmarks/dvna/dvna; excludes vendor/minified assets. npm audit is dependency advisory scope—omitted from SAST columns in the heatmap, not scored as 0% app-code parity. JWT / SSRF / prototype pollution are not among these eleven DVNA ground-truth rows.

tools.label: VibeScan
tools.recallNote: 11/11 on eleven DVNA case families (2026-04-04 VibeScan 1.1.0 run); line-level match policy in results/dvna-case-catalog.json.
tools.dvnaRunIssueCountNote: Matches summary.totalFindings on the aligned vibescan-project.json (full DVNA tree; first-party scope). Benchmark “11/11” is catalog anchors only, not this count.

tools.label: Bearer
tools.dvnaRunIssueCountNote: Frozen Bearer JSON on DVNA commit per results/dvna-evaluation.md.

tools.label: Snyk Code
tools.dvnaRunIssueCountNote: Captured Snyk Code CLI JSON; severities mix error/warning/note.

tools.label: Semgrep
tools.recallNote: Derived from benchmarks/results/2026-04-03_dvna_semgrep_1.157.0/semgrep.json; packs p/javascript + p/security-audit. results.length = 11.
tools.dvnaRunIssueCountNote: Semgrep OSS JSON results array on DVNA (frozen run).

tools.label: CodeQL
tools.recallNote: Heuristic case hits from benchmarks/results/2026-04-03_084922_dvna_codeql_v2.25.1/codeql.sarif (file suffix + anchor line); subject to manual adjudication like Semgrep. SARIF results count = 46.

tools.label: eslint-plugin-security
tools.recallNote: 1/11 case recall in dvna-evaluation.md; 493 warning/error rows in captured results/eslint-dvna.txt (includes vendor/minified assets such as jquery-3.2.1.min.js).
tools.dvnaRunIssueCountNote: Line count of diagnostics in results/eslint-dvna.txt — not first-party-only; heatmap uses stricter case anchors.

tools.label: npm audit
tools.recallNote: Not line-level SAST parity; intentionally omitted from detection-rate polyline.
